positive: A minimalist, abstract pattern featuring stylized mountains and flowing crescent moons interlocking with delicate constellations. The style is modern linocut etching mixed with Art Nouveau geometry. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo blue, burnt sienna, and crisp white. The composition must be centered and repeatable, ideal for apparel printing. Strong, clean silhouettes are essential. Emphasize negative space and clean outlines. Studio lighting, vector quality, ultra-detailed, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, low detail, noisy, cropped, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain
